title: Chapter 68
content:
Chapter 68: Verbal Teasing and Edging Play

What a beautiful body.

When Ana-san raised her arms while taking off her dress, I saw her armpits—completely hairless, not a single strand.

Her body was toned like a true warrior’s, with zero unnecessary fat.

But even though they were modest in size, her breasts were properly developed, and her ass had just the right amount of flesh.

Hm?

There was a bandage wrapped around her firm right thigh. Come to think of it, when she moved here at high speed earlier, she was favoring her left leg. So she really is injured.

Finally, the last piece covering her body— the armor around her waist—was removed.

Her lower abdomen was so smooth and translucent it almost looked pure. Not a single hair.

Her skin was truly beautiful. It was so flawlessly smooth that it looked like not even peach fuzz could grow there.

Too smooth, honestly.

Even little girls usually have some peach fuzz.

Just like Lucia, whose body hair gets burned off in magma baths, Ana-san’s skin was completely smooth.

Could it be...?

"Your fire magic is so strong that it burns off all your body hair?"

"...! You noticed well. I protect my head with magic power, so my hair remains, but every other part gets burned away."

She sounded a little disappointed.

Does being hairless make her feel like she looks childish?

"It’s beautiful."

"I know."

Her curt tone came from being told she’s beautiful all the time. Still, she seemed slightly embarrassed—her words came out just a little faster than usual.

"Now, put both hands on the rock and point your ass this way."

"Kh... So you’re forcing an A-rank knight like me into a prisoner-like pose?"

...She sounds kind of excited.

Her eyes are still full of heart marks.

"You’ve done this to captives before, right? Now it’s your turn to have your holes thoroughly inspected to make sure you’re not hiding any weapons."

"Kh... Haa... haa... H-How’s this? I put both hands on the rock like you told me..."

Her breathing had grown rough. She seemed excited by the humiliating pose.

"What do you mean ’how’s this’? Don’t you understand what it means to point your ass at me? Spread your legs shoulder-width apart."

I deliberately used a commanding tone.

If Ana-san really gets excited from humiliating positions, then verbal abuse should work well on her...

Intense sexual activity is about to begin...

Sensing that, I took off my robe. Since I borrowed it from gatekeeper A, I couldn’t risk staining it with the guild leader’s love juices. It was borrowed property, so I folded it neatly.

"Wh-What are you doing? Hurry up..."

"Hurry?"

"Kh... You know what I mean. Hurry..."

"Wait until I finish folding the clothes I took off."

"To think I’d be forced into such a humiliating pose that I’ve never shown to my parents or my fellow knights...!"

Ana-san groaned "kh..." but still obeyed my instructions.

If I keep humiliating her like this, I might even get her to say "Kh... Kill me."

"Alright, preparations complete."

"D-Don’t tease me..."

"There’s not a single hair around your asshole either. It looks like you shaved it just to get fucked."

"Kh... I told you. When I use fire magic, my body hair burns away."

"It’s common knowledge that female knights have weak assholes. Make sure you protect it better next time."

"Kh... It’s true I may have neglected my rear defenses..."

On the other hand, I’d love to know if there’s any creature whose asshole isn’t a weak point.

The more you train, the weaker this spot gets. The answer is: A-NA-L.

"What a spectacular view. If I sat on the ground I could admire both your pussy and asshole at the same time. I was about to say it looks childish because it’s hairless... but your inner labia are peeking out nicely. This side is properly adult. They’re quivering as if begging to be licked."

"Kh... This isn’t the time to critique my naked body. We’re in the middle of a skill examination. Hurry..."

"Hurry? Hurry and do what? Say it clearly."

"Th-The skill...! You’re supposed to test whether your Wind Pressure Masturbation can pierce my defenses!"

"You’re not wording it correctly. Beg properly: ’Please insert your cock into my asshole.’"

"Co... Cock—"

PAAN!

I slapped her white ass.

"Kh...!!"

Whether it was from the pain in her ass or the wound on her right leg, Ana-san let out a deeper groan than before.

A red handprint slowly rose on the white canvas of her ass.

Come to think of it...

My physical attack power and Ana-san’s are the same. Our physical defense should be similar too.

That means the ass right in front of me is one I can slap with full power, right?

If I slapped Iferasuki’s or Kemololi’s ass with everything I had, I’d probably injure them.

On the other hand, even if I slapped Lucia’s ass, it probably wouldn’t do more damage than a gentle breeze.

But Ana-san’s ass...

"Cock in—"

"Oraah!"

PAAN!

"Kh...! W-Why are you hitting me? A scar on the back is a warrior’s shame. I’ve never once taken an attack from behind..."

PAAN!

"Auu...! What humiliation...!"

I don’t care what she says with her mouth.

She isn’t restrained at all. She could run away or resist if she wanted. The fact that she isn’t means she’s enjoying this.

For someone who carries the heavy burden of being a knight commander every day, I hope this serves as good stress relief.

Hm?

Something glistened.

Is her inner labia slightly glistening?

Reflection from the flames?

Or did she get a little wet just from having her ass slapped?

"Hmm... Still, it really is completely hairless and beautiful. The inside of the wrinkles isn’t darkened at all—it’s a lovely flower-like pink..."

"M-Masaharu. Exactly where are you looking?"

Haa... haa...

Ana-san’s breathing was getting rough.

"My... My crotch is being hit by your breath. From that close... what exactly are you looking at?"

"You already know."

Fuuu.

I blew air directly onto her asshole.

Twitch.

Her asshole cutely clenched.

No matter how beautifully a woman shaves her asshole, with today’s advanced filming equipment and streaming technology, you can’t hide the hair in close-up anal scenes. Even after shaving, some stubble always remains, like a man’s beard.

But Ana-san’s asshole, which gets burned by flames, didn’t show even the slightest hint of growing hair. I don’t know if it’s because she used fire magic in recent battles or if the roots themselves were incinerated.

There were no signs she’d played with toys, and no darkening from pigmentation.

It was truly a beautiful asshole...

It might not be an exaggeration to say it was second only to Lucia’s, whose hair roots get burned away in magma baths. It could be the ultimate asshole a human could achieve.

"Even I, who has watched every single video in the lesbian anal category on the biggest video site, have only seen an adult asshole this clean and pristine once before."

If I were to rate it as an adult asshole, Ana-san’s rivaled the redhead and blonde from the lesbian anal video that led to my death and reincarnation to this other world.

In other words, if I got obsessed with the charm of Ana’s asshole and started jerking my cock purely on instinct, I’d cum myself to death.

If the pussy gives life, then the asshole is filled with enough charm to take life away.

I need to stay focused here.

I gave the red, swollen handprint on her ass one short kiss.
